name: iron-core-gym
description: Iron Core Gym Hub - Next.js, Express, and Python LangGraph Agent

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && python3 -m venv agent/.venv && agent/.venv/bin/pip install -r agent/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:agent"
